name: Lamphun city / Route 106 urban corridor
capture_notes: City center around Hariphunchai and Route 106 corridor; retail (Big C/Lotus), hospital, bus terminal, and strong commuter flow toward Chiang Mai.

name: Route 11 Chiang Mai-Lamphun-Lampang corridor
capture_notes: High AADT Route 11 corridor (30k+); heavy commuter, intercity, and logistics traffic. Good for roadside DCFC hub near Lamphun bypass.

name: Pa Sang / Route 114 district corridor
capture_notes: Pa Sang district and Route 114 corridor; moderate local demand with residential and market anchors.

name: Mae Tha / Route 106 south corridor
capture_notes: Route 106 south corridor through Mae Tha; lower density but steady corridor flow.

name: Li district / Route 106 far south
capture_notes: Remote south Lamphun district on Route 106 toward Tak/Mae Sariang; limited local demand but relevant for corridor continuity.
